sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47561" key="h)ripo/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠρι-πόλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πολέω</etym>) <sense id="n47561.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">early-walking</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dawn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.227</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">253</biblScope> </bibl> (ld.).</sense> </entryFree>
